title: Gardeners' Digest February
excerpt: If you're coming from Laura Craigie's blog, or you're a regular, welcome! It's the 22nd of the month once again (already!). Some of the Garden Girls from Two Peas In A Bucket are doing a little blog hop. Obsessed with…
body:
If you're coming from Laura Craigie's blog, or you're a regular, welcome! It's the 22nd of the month once again (already!). Some of the Garden Girls from Two Peas In A Bucket are doing a little blog hop.

Obsessed with these little wood veneers from Studio Calico.

1. Everything by Maggie Holmes, really, but this 6X6 pad is perfection.

2. Color Me Happy Rainbow chevron washi tape by Glitz Design

3. Snippets Printed Chipboard Thickers - the perfect size and font.

4. Hero Arts Charcoal Shadow Ink - On the list again as it is the perfect juicy grey.

5. These colorful enamel dots - I want to stick these on everything. Except my dogs.

This layout by my3blessings using my newest release with American Crafts - Yes, Please.

GIVEAWAY: Win a spot to Wilna's Art Class! Check out her absolutely adorable promo video on youtube.

TO ENTER: If you’d like to win a spot in the Wilna's Art Class, just leave a comment and include your 2peas username. If you’ve already purchased the class (it’s a great price – $25), your class fee will be refunded or you can gift the spot to a friend. Giveaway will close February 26th at 7am and winner will be announced on this post shortly after.

GIVEAWAY IS CLOSED... WINNER is #35: Lori W says: February 22, 2013 at 11:37 am(Edit)

Would love to win a spot in Wilna’s class! Thanks for the chance to win! my 2peas name is LoriWilb CONGRATS!

Last stop on the hop is Two Peas blog where you will also see the entire list of participants.
